finding: A. INCREASED HYDROSTATIC PRESSURE (a) cardiogenic (most common) = PULMONARY VENOUS HYPERTENSION

differentials.name: Heart disease: left ventricular failure, mitral valve disease, left atrial myxoma
differentials.raw: Heart disease: left ventricular failure, mitral valve disease, left atrial myxoma

differentials.name: Pulmonary venous disease: acute / chronic pulmonary embolism, primary venoocclusive disease, mediastinal fibrosis
differentials.raw: Pulmonary venous disease: acute / chronic pulmonary embolism, primary venoocclusive disease, mediastinal fibrosis

differentials.name: Pericardial disease: pericardial effusion, constrictive pericarditis
differentials.raw: Pericardial disease: pericardial effusion, constrictive pericarditis (extremely rare)

differentials.name: Drugs: antiarrhythmic drugs; drugs depressing myocardial contractility (beta- blocker) (b)  noncardiogenic
differentials.raw: Drugs: antiarrhythmic drugs; drugs depressing myocardial contractility (beta- blocker) (b)  noncardiogenic

differentials.name: Hyperosmolar fluid (eg, contrast medium) (c)  neurogenic ? sympathetic venoconstriction in cerebrovascular accident, head injury, CNS tumor,
